leadText: The Cover Fossil (Japanese: ふたのカセキ Cover Fossil) is a fossil introduced in Generation V that can be regenerated into Tirtouga. It is the counterpart of the Plume Fossil.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Passive effect [ edit | edit source ] If brought to the one of the following locations, the Cover Fossil can be regenerated into a Tirtouga . Games Location B W B2 W2 Nacrene Museum X Y Ambrette Town Fossil Lab OR AS Devon Corporation in Rustboro City S M US UM Fossil Restoration Center on Route 8

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods B W Relic Castle (choice between this and the Plume Fossil ) B2 W2 Nacrene City (choice between this and the Plume Fossil ) Join Avenue ( Antique Shops ) Funfest Mission (found in glowing spots in "Forgotten Lost Items!" and for sale in "What is the Best Price?") B2 X Y Rock Smash ( Glittering Cave , after entering the Hall of Fame ) OR AS Rock Smash ( Mirage spots ) AS S M US UM Konikoni City ( Olivia's jewelry shop ) S US Poké Pelago (Isle Aphun: Rare-Treasure Hunting, Interesting-Item Hunting) US UM

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 A fossil of an ancient Pokémon that lived in the sea in ancient times. It appears to be part of its back. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A fossil from a prehistoric Pokémon that once lived in the sea. It appears as though it could be part of its back. S V A fossil from a prehistoric Pokémon that once lived in the sea. It appears as though it could be part of a creature's back.
